ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone used for the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot operating the drone */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the flight took place */,
  "flight_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the flight (e.g., surveillance, agriculture) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  "coordinate_frame" TEXT /* Coordinate frame used for positioning (e.g., WGS84, NAD83) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_coordinate_frame FOREIGN KEY ("coordinate_frame") REFERENCES coordinate_frames ("frame_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "drone_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone associated with the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., camera, LiDAR) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the sensor */,
  "angular_resolution" REAL /* Angular resolution of the sensor */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drone_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight during which the target was detected */,
  "target_num" TEXT /* The ID of the target if multiple targets are present */,
  "angle_x" REAL /* X-axis angular offset of the target from the center of the image */,
  "angle_y" REAL /* Y-axis angular offset of the target from the center of the image */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the target in specified format */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., animal, vehicle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drone */,
  "max_flight_time" REAL /* Maximum flight time in minutes */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the drone in kg */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the drone in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Full name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the pilot */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the pilot (e.g., 0-5) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the pilot in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the log */,
  "timestamp_usec" TEXT /* Timestamp in microseconds since epoch or system boot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., completed, aborted) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the flight */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the drone during the flight */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the drone during the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight during which the reading was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES drone_sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinate_frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate frame */,
  "frame_name" TEXT /* Name of the coordinate frame */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coordinate frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id")
)
